hero.description: Experience the timeless beauty of Balinese craftsmanship through our authentic handmade collection, where every piece reflects quality, tradition, and cultural heritage.

about.title: Crafting Balinese Heritage Since 1997
about.paragraph1: Ani's Collection was founded in 1997 with a passion for sharing authentic Balinese handicrafts with the world. Starting as a family-owned workshop in Bali, we have grown into a trusted destination for handcrafted art loved by customers across many countries.
about.paragraph2: Every piece is carefully handmade by skilled local artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations. We are committed to preserving Bali's rich cultural heritage while delivering quality craftsmanship and timeless designs.

collections.title: Explore Our Range
collections.description: Authentic Balinese handicrafts, each piece crafted with devotion and cultural pride.

masks.title: Masks & Wall Decor
masks.description: Traditional masks and handcrafted wall decor.

products.title: Handpicked for You
products.description: A curated selection of our finest Balinese creations, each handmade with care and cultural authenticity.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.description: Trusted by buyers from around the world. Here is what they say about Ani's Collection.

emily.review: Exceptional quality and authentic Balinese artistry. The wooden dragon statue I purchased is a true masterpiece. International shipping was smooth and the packaging was excellent. Highly recommended!

partners.title: Our Trusted Partners
partners.description: Proud to collaborate with leading retail partners across Indonesia and beyond.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Visit our store, reach out on WhatsApp, or connect on social media. We would love to hear from you.
contact.address: Jl. Raya Mas No. 29, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571, Indonesia

footer.description: Authentic handmade Balinese crafts created with care, tradition, and cultural pride since 1997.
